name: socos
description: Read personal CRM context from Socos through its authenticated MCP endpoint.

interface.longDescription: Use a dedicated read-only Socos agent credential to review relationship context, briefs, reminders, important dates, and social suggestions.
defaultPrompt: Review my Socos brief and surface the most useful next conversations
Find relationship context and important dates I should remember
Summarize my current social suggestions without taking external action
